The Problem

Every missed call is a patient choosing your competitor

When someone calls your clinic in pain and no one answers, they don't wait. They Google the next chiropractor and book there — in minutes.

📞
Missed calls go unanswered
Most clinics have no system to follow up. The patient moves on within 5 minutes.
⏰
Slow follow-up kills conversions
Clinics that respond within 5 minutes are 9x more likely to book that patient.
💸
Silent revenue leak every week
At $500–$2,000 lifetime value per patient, this adds up to $10,000+/month lost.
3–5
New patients lost per week
The average chiropractic clinic loses 3–5 new patients every single week — not from bad service, but from slow or zero follow-up on missed calls. You never even know they called.
How It Works

Three steps. Fully automated.
Live in 7 days.

01
📲
Missed call detected instantly
The moment a call goes unanswered at your clinic, our system fires automatically — no manual action, no delay, no exceptions.
02
💬
Patient gets a text in 60 seconds
A personalised SMS is sent within 60 seconds. If they don't respond, the system follows up automatically — 3 more times over 48 hours.
03
📅
They book online — you do nothing
A booking link is included in the message. They schedule themselves. Your front desk handles zero of this — it's 100% automatic.
Our Niches

Built specifically for
your clinic type

We don't do generic. Every system we build is tailored to your exact niche — because a chiro clinic and a dental practice have very different needs.

📞

Auto SMS within 60 seconds of every missed call — capture leads before they dial a competitor.

Why ScalEvo

Not just another agency.
A growth partner.

Here's why clinic owners across the USA choose ScalEvo over freelancers and generic agencies.

🎯
Niche Specialists Only
We only work with chiropractic and dental clinics. That means every system we build is proven and optimised for your exact type of practice — not copy-pasted from a random template.
⚡
Live in 7 Days
No month-long onboarding. No waiting. We move fast — your full automation system is built, tested, and live within 7 business days of payment.
🤝
Done-For-You Completely
You don't touch a thing. We handle setup, configuration, testing, and training. You just approve and watch the automations run.
💬
Direct WhatsApp Access
No ticket system. No waiting 3 days for an email reply. You get direct WhatsApp access to Timsal — your dedicated system builder — throughout the project.
📊
Results You Can Measure
We set up dashboards so you can see exactly how many leads were captured, how many booked, and how much revenue the system recovered — in real time.
🔒
Flat Fee. No Surprises.
One setup fee. One monthly rate. No hourly billing surprises, no hidden fees, no upsells you didn't ask for. What you see on our pricing page is exactly what you pay.

FAQ

Questions we get
all the time

No fluff — straight answers.

Can I see a demo before I commit? +
Absolutely. Book a free audit call and we'll walk you through a live demo of the exact system we'd build for your clinic. No pressure, no pitch — just a real look at what your automation would look like in action.
Is the setup fee paid in advance? +
Yes — the one-time setup fee is required upfront before we begin any work. This covers the full build of your automation system. No setup work is started until payment is confirmed. Once paid, we begin immediately and deliver within 7 business days.
Do you offer a free trial? +
Yes — after your system is fully set up, we offer a 14-day trial period where you can see the automations running live in your clinic. If you don't see real results within those 14 days, we'll audit and fix everything at no extra charge. We're that confident in what we build.
How long does setup actually take? +
We deliver your full system within 7 business days of receiving payment and access credentials. Most setups are completed in 5 days. We'll give you daily updates via WhatsApp throughout the build.
What if I'm not happy with the results? +
We stand behind our work. If after 30 days the system isn't performing as expected, we will audit, fix, and optimise everything at no extra cost. We don't disappear after delivery — we're invested in your results.
How does the monthly retainer work? +
The monthly fee covers your GHL sub-account, ongoing optimisation, new automations added as your clinic grows, and priority WhatsApp support. You can cancel with 14 days notice — no contracts, no lock-ins.
What do you need from me to get started? +
Just three things: access to your GHL account (or we create one), your clinic's basic details (name, number, services), and 30 minutes for an onboarding WhatsApp call. We handle everything else from there.
Do I need to already have GoHighLevel? +
No — we handle everything. If you don't have a GHL account, we set one up for you as part of the onboarding. If you already have one, we build directly inside your existing account. Either way, you don't need any technical knowledge.
Is this only for large clinics? +
Not at all. Our systems are built for solo practitioners and small clinic teams — exactly the type of practice that doesn't have a dedicated marketing team and needs automation the most. If you're getting 5+ calls a week, this system pays for itself.
Do you work with both chiro and dental? +
Yes — those are our two core niches. We have purpose-built systems for both types of clinics. Each niche gets tailored messaging, automations, and pipelines designed specifically for how their patients behave and book.

Privacy Policy Terms & Conditions

Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 2026

ScalEvo ("we", "us", or "our") operates the website scalevo.live. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you visit our website or contact us about our services.

1. Information We Collect

We may collect the following types of information:

  • Contact information — your name, email address, phone number, and business name when you reach out to us via WhatsApp, email, or any contact form.
  • Usage data — anonymous information about how you interact with our website, such as pages visited and time spent on site.
  • Communications — records of messages, calls, or emails exchanged between you and ScalEvo.

2. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:

  • Respond to your enquiries and provide our services
  • Send you relevant information about ScalEvo services you have requested
  • Improve our website and service quality
  • Comply with legal obligations

We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to any third party.

3. GoHighLevel & Third-Party Tools

Our services are built on the GoHighLevel (GHL) platform. When we set up automation systems for clients, contact and appointment data is processed within GHL's infrastructure. GHL has its own privacy policy which governs data stored within their platform. We also use WhatsApp for communication, which is subject to Meta's privacy policy.

4. Data Storage & Security

We take reasonable precautions to protect your personal data. Information shared with us is stored securely and accessed only by authorised members of the ScalEvo team. We retain your data only as long as necessary to provide services or as required by law.

5. Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Request access to the personal data we hold about you
  • Request correction or deletion of your data
  • Withdraw consent to communications at any time

To exercise any of these rights, contact us via WhatsApp at +923200647320 or email us at hello@scalevo.live.

6. Cookies

Our website may use basic cookies to improve your browsing experience. You can disable cookies in your browser settings at any time without affecting your ability to use our website.

7. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Continued use of our website after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

8. Contact

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
ScalEvo
WhatsApp: +923200647320
Email: hello@scalevo.live
Website: scalevo.live

Terms & Conditions

Last updated: April 2026

Please read these Terms & Conditions carefully before engaging ScalEvo for any services. By using our website or hiring our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

1. Services

ScalEvo provides GoHighLevel (GHL) automation setup and management services for chiropractic clinics and other local businesses. Our services include but are not limited to: missed call text-back automation, follow-up sequences, appointment reminders, Google review automation, CRM pipeline setup, and ongoing system management.

2. Payments

  • A one-time setup fee is required before work begins. No setup work is started until payment is confirmed.
  • Monthly retainer fees are billed at the start of each month.
  • All prices are listed in USD. International payments are accepted via Wise, Payoneer, or PayPal.
  • Refunds are not offered once setup work has commenced. If we are unable to deliver the agreed setup within 14 days, a full refund will be issued.

3. Delivery

We aim to deliver all setups within 7 business days of receiving payment and all required access credentials from the client. Delays caused by the client's failure to provide necessary information or access will not be counted against our delivery timeline.

4. Client Responsibilities

To complete your setup, you agree to:

  • Provide timely access to your GoHighLevel account and any required sub-accounts
  • Respond to onboarding questions within 48 hours
  • Provide accurate business information required to configure automations

5. Intellectual Property

All automation workflows, templates, and systems built by ScalEvo within your GHL account become your property upon full payment. ScalEvo retains the right to use anonymised results and general methodologies for portfolio and marketing purposes.

6. Limitation of Liability

ScalEvo is not responsible for results that depend on factors outside our control, including but not limited to: the client's call volume, GHL platform outages, changes to GHL's features or pricing, or the client's failure to follow onboarding instructions. We do not guarantee specific revenue or booking outcomes.

7. Confidentiality

Both parties agree to keep confidential any proprietary business information shared during the engagement. ScalEvo will not share your business data, client lists, or internal systems with third parties.

8. Termination

Either party may terminate monthly services with 14 days written notice via WhatsApp or email. No partial month refunds are issued upon termination. One-time setup fees are non-refundable once work has begun.

9. Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of Pakistan. Any disputes will first be attempted to be resolved through good-faith negotiation between both parties.

10. Contact

For any questions about these Terms & Conditions:
ScalEvo
WhatsApp: +923200647320
Email: hello@scalevo.live
Website: scalevo.live
